message:
fix: gt doctor --fix can now provision missing patrol formulas (#2105)

PatrolMoleculesExistCheck was a BaseCheck (detect-only). Changed to
FixableCheck and added Fix() that calls formula.ProvisionFormulas()
to write embedded patrol formula templates to .beads/formulas/.

Closes #2105

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
